array_types.name: Fields_Bounds
array_types.code: type Fields_Bounds is array (Positive range <>) of Bounds;

record_types.name: Bounds

subprograms.name: Extract
Get_Bounds
subprograms.code: function Get_Bounds (Item : String; Separator : Character := ',') return Fields_Bounds

subprograms.name: Unquote
subprograms.code: function Unquote (Item : String; Slice : Bounds; Size : Natural := 0) return String
